scripts.text:
WITH M1 AS 
(
SELECT DISTINCT
	Division,
	LeadSubSourceID,
	SourceGroup,
	Source,
	CASE 
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Home Work%'    THEN 'Agents Referral'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Ron %'        THEN 'Broadcast TV'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Canvas%'    AND ( SubSource NOT LIKE '%JB Canvas%' AND SubSource NOT LIKE '%DP Canvass%') THEN 'Canvass'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Show %'    OR Source LIKE '%Shows %' OR Source LIKE '% Show'    OR Source LIKE '% Shows' OR Source LIKE 'Shows' OR Source LIKE 'Show'    THEN 'Events'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Event%'        THEN 'Events'
		WHEN Division='RTW' AND SourceGroup LIKE '%Event Marketing%'  THEN 'Events'  -- Level 1 Match
		WHEN Source LIKE 'Liner%'        THEN 'Manufacturer'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Out of Home%'THEN 'Out of Home'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%PPC%'        THEN 'Paid Search'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%BJs%' OR  SubSource  LIKE '%BJ%'       THEN 'Retail'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Sams Club%' OR  SubSource  LIKE '%Sams Club%' THEN 'Retail'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Home Show%'        THEN 'Events'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Costco%'        THEN 'Retail'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Home Depot%'    THEN 'Retail'
		WHEN Division='SWR' AND SourceGroup LIKE '%Home Depot%'  THEN 'Retail'  -- Level 1 Match
		WHEN Division='RTW' AND Source LIKE '%Double Pop%'  THEN 'Employee Referral'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Mall%'        THEN 'Retail'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Wallmart%'    THEN 'Retail'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Sam%'        THEN 'Retail'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Store%'        THEN 'Retail'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Valpak%'        THEN 'Shared Mail'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Kohler%'        THEN 'Manufacturer'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%RemoPro%'	THEN 'Agents Referral'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Show%'	THEN 'Events'
		WHEN SubSource LIKE '%Leads.IO%' or SubSource like '%Social Blue%' or SubSource like '%Keyword Connect%' THEN 'Branded Partner' --- Level 3 Match for All Div
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Leads.IO%' or Source like '%Social Blue%' or Source like '%Keyword Connect%' THEN 'Branded Partner' 
		ELSE NULL END AS CAL_SOURCE
	FROM [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] Where MappingInd='UNMAP' and 
	Source<>'0' and Source is not null
	AND Division!='CTA'
	
	)


UPDATE  [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]  SET 
        UNI_CHANNEL				= M2.TX_CHANNEL
       ,UNI_SOURCEGROUP			= M2.TX_SOURCEGROUP
       ,UNI_SOURCECODE				= M2.TX_SOURCECODE
       ,MAPPINGIND				= 'MAP'
       ,LASTUPDATEDTS			= GETDATE()

FROM M1 
JOIN [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] MX ON M1.LeadSubSourceID = MX.LeadSubSourceID
JOIN (
			SELECT DISTINCT TX_SOURCEGROUP,TX_SOURCECODE,TX_CHANNEL
				FROM [ZML].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]
				WHERE TX_SOURCECODE!='0' AND TX_SOURCECODE!='NA'
				) M2
ON M1.CAL_SOURCE = M2.TX_SOURCECODE
WHERE CAL_SOURCE IS NOT NULL;



--******************************************
--******************************************



WITH M1 AS 
(
SELECT DISTINCT
	Division,
	LeadSubSourceID,
	SourceGroup,
	Source,
	CASE 
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Radio%'    		THEN 'Broadcast Radio'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Canvas%'    AND ( SubSource NOT LIKE '%JB Canvas%' AND SubSource NOT LIKE '%DP Canvass%') THEN 'Canvass'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Cust Referral%'    	THEN 'Consumer Referral'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Direct Mail%'    	THEN 'Direct Mail'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Directories%'    	THEN 'Directories'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Email%'    			THEN 'Email'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Emp Referral%'    	THEN 'Employee Referral'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Event%' OR Source LIKE '%Events%' OR Source LIKE '%Home Show%'  OR Source LIKE '%Show or Event%'  OR Source LIKE '%Showroom%' THEN 'Events'
		
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Manufacturer%'    	THEN 'Manufacturer'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Native%'    			THEN 'Native'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Newspaper%' OR Source LIKE '%Print%'   THEN 'Newspapers/Magazines'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Out of Home%'    THEN 'Out of Home'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Paid Search%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%YOUTUBE%'  THEN 'Paid Search'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Paid Social%'    THEN 'Paid Social'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Rehash%'    THEN 'Consumer Referral'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%BJs%' OR  SubSource  LIKE '%BJ%'       THEN 'Retail'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Sams Club%' OR  SubSource  LIKE '%Sams Club%' THEN 'Retail'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Home Show%'        THEN 'Events'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%SelfGen%'     	THEN 'Employee Referral'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Shared Mail%'    THEN 'Shared Mail'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Sign%'    		THEN 'Out of Home'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Social%'    		THEN 'Paid Social'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Native%'    		THEN 'Native'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Television%'    			THEN 'Broadcast TV'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%website%'    			THEN 'Paid Search'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Yellow Pages%'    		THEN 'Directories'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Branded Digital%'    		THEN 'Branded Partner'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Organic/SEO%'    		THEN 'Organic/SEO'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Prev Customer%'    		THEN 'Consumer Referral'
		WHEN SubSource LIKE '%Leads.IO%' or SubSource like '%Social Blue%' or SubSource like '%Keyword Connect%' THEN 'Branded Partner' --- Level 3 Match for All Div
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Leads.IO%' or Source like '%Social Blue%' or Source like '%Keyword Connect%' THEN 'Branded Partner' 
		ELSE NULL END AS CAL_Source
	FROM [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] Where MappingInd='UNMAP' and 
	Source<>'0' and Source is not null
	AND Division='CTA'
	
	)



UPDATE  [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]  SET 
        UNI_CHANNEL				= M2.TX_CHANNEL
       ,UNI_SOURCEGROUP			= M2.TX_SOURCEGROUP
       ,UNI_SOURCECODE				= M2.TX_SOURCECODE
       ,MAPPINGIND				= 'MAP'
       ,LASTUPDATEDTS			= GETDATE()

FROM M1 
JOIN [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] MX ON M1.LeadSubSourceID = MX.LeadSubSourceID
JOIN (
			SELECT DISTINCT TX_SOURCEGROUP,TX_SOURCECODE,TX_CHANNEL
				FROM [ZML].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]
				WHERE TX_SOURCECODE!='0' AND TX_SOURCECODE!='NA'
				) M2
ON M1.CAL_SOURCE = M2.TX_SOURCECODE
WHERE CAL_SOURCE IS NOT NULL;

--------------------------------------------------------LEVEL3 KEYWORDS MATCH

-------------------------------------------------------************* FHI ************------------------------------

WITH T_FHI AS
(
SELECT 
	Division,
	LeadSubSourceID,
	SourceGroup,
	Source,
    CASE 
		WHEN ( UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%RADIO%' 	OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% FM' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% FM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'FM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%-FM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% FM-%'
													OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% AM' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% AM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'AM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%-AM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% AM-%'
													OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'iHeart%' 
													OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%ESPN%'
													)	AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%NEWS%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%TOUR%'  THEN 'Broadcast Radio'
													

		
		WHEN (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%TV%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%TELEVISION%' 
													OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'PROMEDIA%'
													OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%RSR%'	
													OR (UPPER(Source) LIKE '%RON SHERMAN%')
													
													) AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%BCI-WIT%' THEN 'Broadcast TV'
													
		
		WHEN (	UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%DIRECT MAIL%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%MAILER%' OR  UPPER(SubSource) LIKE  '%MAY - BATH%')
									AND (UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%VELPAK%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%VEL PAK%' AND UPPER(SubSource)  NOT LIKE '%DIRECT MAIL - RENUITY%') THEN 'Direct Mail'
        
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%FACEBOOK%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%META%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PINTEREST%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%INSTAGRAM%' THEN 'Paid Social'
						
						
        WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YELP%' THEN 'Directories'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YOUTUBE%' THEN 'YouTube' 
		
        WHEN (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%GOOGLE%' 
						--OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YOUTUBE%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YAHOO%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PPC%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PERFORMANCE MAX%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PAID SEARCH%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%BING – RENUITY%'
						
						) 
						AND (UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%ORGANIC%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%LOCAL%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%TV%'  ) THEN 'Paid Search'
						
						
        WHEN (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%ORGANIC%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%SEO%' ) AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%CUSTOMER REFERRAL%' THEN 'Organic/SEO'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%EMAIL%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%CONQUEST%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%ADAPTIVE%' THEN 'Email'
		
        WHEN ( (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%GANNETT%' AND SourceGroup LIKE '%Print%') OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%NEWSPAPER%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%MAGAZINE%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%JOURNAL%' ) THEN 'Newspapers/Magazines'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%VALPAK%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%VAL PAK%' 
												  OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%REDPLUM%' 
												  OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%RSVP%'
												  OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%REDPLUM%'
												  THEN 'Shared Mail'
												  
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%NATIVE ADS%'  THEN 'Native'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%MALL%' 
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'SAM%'  
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%HOME DEPOT%'
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%BRANDSMART%'
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%IME- BJ%'
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%IME BJ%'
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%IME-Sams%'
					THEN 'Retail'
					
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%CANVAS%' AND (UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%JB CANVAS%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%DP CANVASS%')  THEN 'Canvass'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%WALK-IN%'  OR (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%CUSTOMER REFERRAL%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%ORGANIC%') THEN 'Consumer Referral'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%LAVIN MEDIA%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%SOCIAL BLUE%'   THEN 'Branded Partner'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YARD%' THEN 'Out of Home'

		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%DP Canvass%' THEN 'Agents Referral'
		
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS CAL_Source 
FROM [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] 
WHERE Division = 'FHI' and MappingInd='UNMAP' 
)


UPDATE  [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]  SET 
        UNI_CHANNEL				= M2.TX_CHANNEL
       ,UNI_SOURCEGROUP			= M2.TX_SOURCEGROUP
       ,UNI_SourceCode			= M2.TX_SourceCOde
       ,MAPPINGIND				= 'MAP'
       ,LASTUPDATEDTS			= GETDATE()

FROM T_FHI M1 
JOIN [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] MX ON M1.LeadSubSourceID = MX.LeadSubSourceID
JOIN (
			SELECT DISTINCT TX_SOURCEGROUP,TX_SourceCOde,TX_CHANNEL
				FROM [ZML].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]
				WHERE TX_SourceCOde!='0' AND TX_SourceCOde!='NA'
				) M2
ON M1.CAL_Source = M2.TX_SourceCOde
WHERE CAL_Source IS NOT NULL;


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ MXH---------

/*
WITH T_MXH AS 
(

SELECT 
	Division,
	LeadSubSourceID,
	SourceGroup,
	Source,
    CASE 
		WHEN ( UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%RADIO%' 	OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% FM' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% FM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'FM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%-FM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% FM-%'
													OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% AM' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% AM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'AM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%-AM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% AM-%'
													OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'iHeart%'

													)	AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%NEWS%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%TOUR%'
														AND UPPER(Source) NOT LIKE '%LINERS DIRECT%' THEN 'Broadcast Radio'
		
		-- Fuzzy logic not working for TV - MXH
		--WHEN (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%TV%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%TELEVISION%' ) AND UPPER(SourceGroup) NOT LIKE '%MEDIA%' THEN 'Broadcast TV'

									AND (UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%VELPAK%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%VEL PAK%' 
									AND UPPER(SubSource)  NOT LIKE '%DIRECT MAIL - RENUITY%' AND UPPER(Source) NOT LIKE '%LINERS DIRECT%' ) THEN 'Direct Mail'
        
		
		WHEN (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%FACEBOOK%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%META%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PINTEREST%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%INSTAGRAM%'
						) AND UPPER(Source) NOT LIKE '%MANUFACTURER%' AND UPPER(Source) NOT LIKE '%LINERS DIRECT%'
						THEN 'Paid Social'
						
						
        WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YELP%' THEN 'Directories'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YOUTUBE%' THEN 'YouTube' 
		
        WHEN (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%GOOGLE%' 
						--OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YOUTUBE%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YAHOO%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PPC%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PERFORMANCE MAX%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PAID SEARCH%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%BING – RENUITY%'
						) 
						AND (UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%ORGANIC%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%LOCAL%'  AND UPPER(Source) NOT LIKE '%MANUFACTURER%' AND UPPER(Source) NOT LIKE '%LINERS DIRECT%') THEN 'Paid Search'
						
						
        WHEN (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%ORGANIC%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%SEO%' )  
						AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%CUSTOMER REFERRAL%' 
						AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%BCI Organic%'
						AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%TV%'
						THEN 'Organic/SEO'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%EMAIL%' 
				AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%CONQUEST%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%ADAPTIVE%'
				AND UPPER(Source) NOT LIKE '%MANUFACTURER%' AND UPPER(Source) NOT LIKE '%LINERS DIRECT%' THEN 'Email'
		
        WHEN ( (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%GANNETT%' AND SourceGroup LIKE '%Print%') 
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%NEWSPAPER%' 
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%MAGAZINE%' 
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%JOURNAL%'			
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'WPA %'
						) AND UPPER(Source) NOT LIKE '%LINERS DIRECT%'
					THEN 'Newspapers/Magazines'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%VALPAK%' AND UPPER(Source) NOT LIKE '%LINERS DIRECT%' THEN 'Shared Mail'

		WHEN (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%MALL%'

					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'MHR%'
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%WALMART%'
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'WI-%'
					) AND  UPPER(Source) NOT IN ('DIGITAL','NEWSPAPER')
					THEN 'Retail'
					
					
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%CANVAS%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE 'JB CANVASS%'  THEN 'Canvass'
		
					
		-- No Definite Pattern MAC
		--WHEN (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%REFERRAL%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%ORGANIC%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%KOHLER%') THEN 'Consumer Referral'
		
		WHEN (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%LAVIN%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%GURU DIGITAL%') THEN 'Branded Partner'  
		
		WHEN (UPPER(Source) LIKE '%TRUCK%' OR Source like '%SIGN%') THEN 'Out of Home'
		
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS CAL_Source
FROM [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] 
WHERE Division = 'MXH' AND MAPPINGIND='UNMAP'

)




UPDATE  [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]  SET 
        UNI_CHANNEL				= M2.TX_CHANNEL
       ,UNI_SOURCEGROUP			= M2.TX_SOURCEGROUP
       ,UNI_SourceCode			= M2.TX_SourceCode
       ,MAPPINGIND				= 'MAP'
       ,LASTUPDATEDTS			= GETDATE()

FROM T_MXH M1 
JOIN [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] MX ON M1.LeadSubSourceID = MX.LeadSubSourceID
JOIN (
			SELECT DISTINCT TX_SOURCEGROUP,TX_SourceCode,TX_CHANNEL
				FROM [ZML].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]
				WHERE TX_SourceCode!='0' AND TX_SourceCode!='NA'
				) M2
ON M1.CAL_Source = M2.TX_SourceCode
WHERE CAL_Source IS NOT NULL;


*/

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ MAC---------

WITH T_MAC AS 
(


SELECT 
	Division,
	LeadSubSourceID,
	SourceGroup,
	Source,
    CASE 
		WHEN ( UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%RADIO%' 	OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% FM' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% FM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'FM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%-FM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% FM-%'
													OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% AM' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% AM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'AM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%-AM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% AM-%'
													OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'iHeart%' 
													OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%ESPN%'
													)	AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%NEWS%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%TOUR%' THEN 'Broadcast Radio'
		
		WHEN (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'TV' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% TV' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% TV %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'TV %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%TELEVISION%' 
											  OR (UPPER(Source) LIKE '%TELEVISION%'
													AND 
														(
																UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'CABLE %' 
															OR  UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'CEDAR %'
															OR  UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'DES %'
															OR  UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'GB %'
															OR  UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'LCEAU %'
															OR  UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'MAD %'
															OR  UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'MADISON %'
															OR  UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'MANK %'
															OR  UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'MKE %'
															OR  UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'MN %'
															OR  UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'MN-%'
															OR  UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'PER %'
															OR  UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'QUAD %'
															OR  UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'ROCH %'
															OR  UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'ROCK %'
															OR  UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'WAU %'
															
															)
													)
													
									) AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%BCI-WIT%' THEN 'Broadcast TV'
									
									
		
		WHEN (	UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%DIRECT MAIL%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%MAILER%' OR  UPPER(SubSource) LIKE  '%MAY - BATH%')
									AND (UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%VELPAK%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%VEL PAK%' AND UPPER(SubSource)  NOT LIKE '%DIRECT MAIL - RENUITY%') THEN 'Direct Mail'
        
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%FACEBOOK%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%META%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PINTEREST%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%INSTAGRAM%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%BING – RENUITY%'						
						THEN 'Paid Social'
						
						
        WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YELP%' THEN 'Directories'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YOUTUBE%' THEN 'YouTube'  
		
        WHEN (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%GOOGLE%' 
						--OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YOUTUBE%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YAHOO%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PPC%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PERFORMANCE MAX%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PAID SEARCH%'
						) 
						AND (UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%ORGANIC%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%LOCAL%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%TV%'  ) THEN 'Paid Search'
						
						
        WHEN (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%ORGANIC%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%SEO%' )  
						AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%CUSTOMER REFERRAL%' 
						AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%BCI Organic%'
						AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%TV%'
						THEN 'Organic/SEO'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%EMAIL%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%CONQUEST%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%ADAPTIVE%' THEN 'Email'
		
        WHEN ( (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%GANNETT%' AND SourceGroup LIKE '%Print%') 
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%NEWSPAPER%' 
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%MAGAZINE%' 
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%JOURNAL%'			
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'WPA %'
						)
					THEN 'Newspapers/Magazines'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%VALPAK%' THEN 'Shared Mail'
												  
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%NATIVE ADS%'  THEN 'Native'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%MALL%' 
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'SAM%'  
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%HOME DEPOT%'
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'MHR%'
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%WALMART%'
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'WI-%'
					THEN 'Retail'
					
					
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%CANVAS%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE 'JB CANVASS%'  THEN 'Canvass'
		
					
		-- No Definite Pattern MAC
		--WHEN (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%REFERRAL%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%ORGANIC%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%KOHLER%') THEN 'Consumer Referral'
		
		-- No Definite Pattern MAC
		--WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%LAVIN%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%DOLEAD%'   THEN 'Branded Partner'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YARD%' THEN 'Out of Home'
		
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS CAL_Source
FROM [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] 
WHERE DIVISION = 'MAC' AND MAPPINGIND='UNMAP'
)




UPDATE  [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]  SET 
        UNI_CHANNEL				= M2.TX_CHANNEL
       ,UNI_SOURCEGROUP			= M2.TX_SOURCEGROUP
       ,UNI_SourceCode			= M2.TX_SourceCode
       ,MAPPINGIND				= 'MAP'
       ,LASTUPDATEDTS			= GETDATE()

FROM T_MAC M1 
JOIN [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] MX ON M1.LeadSubSourceID = MX.LeadSubSourceID
JOIN (
			SELECT DISTINCT TX_SOURCEGROUP,TX_SourceCode,TX_CHANNEL
				FROM [ZML].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]
				WHERE TX_SourceCode!='0' AND TX_SourceCode!='NA'
				) M2
ON M1.CAL_Source = M2.TX_SourceCode
WHERE CAL_Source IS NOT NULL;





------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ PBC---------

WITH T_PBC AS 
(

SELECT 
	Division,
	LeadSubSourceID,
	SourceGroup,
	Source,
    CASE 
		WHEN ( UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%RADIO%' 	OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'iHeart%' 
													OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%ESPN%'
													)	AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%NEWS%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%TOUR%' THEN 'Broadcast Radio'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'TV' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% TV' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% TV %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'TV %'
									OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%TELEVISION%' 
									OR UPPER(Source) LIKE '%Ron TV%'
									OR UPPER(Source) LIKE '%KPTV%'
									OR UPPER(Source) LIKE '%Ron Sherman TV%'
									THEN 'Broadcast TV'
									
									
		
		WHEN (	UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%DIRECT MAIL%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%MAILER%' OR  UPPER(SubSource) LIKE  '%MAY - BATH%')
									AND (UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%VELPAK%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%VEL PAK%' AND UPPER(SubSource)  NOT LIKE '%DIRECT MAIL - RENUITY%') THEN 'Direct Mail'
        
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%FACEBOOK%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%META%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PINTEREST%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%INSTAGRAM%'
						OR (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE  'SOCIAL MEDIA' AND Source!='Organic')
						THEN 'Paid Social'
						
						
        WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YELP%' THEN 'Directories'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YOUTUBE%' THEN 'YouTube' 
		
        WHEN (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%GOOGLE%' 
						--OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YOUTUBE%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YAHOO%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PPC%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PERFORMANCE MAX%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PAID SEARCH%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%BING – RENUITY%'
						) 
						AND  (UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%ORGANIC%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%Google My Business%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%TV%') THEN 'Paid Search'
						
						
        WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%ORGANIC%' AND  UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%YELP%' THEN 'Organic/SEO'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%EMAIL%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%CONQUEST%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%ADAPTIVE%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%TIMES%' THEN 'Email'
		
        WHEN  (((UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%GANNETT%' AND SourceGroup LIKE '%Newspaper/Mag%') )
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%NEWSPAPER%' 
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%MAGAZINE%' 
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%JOURNAL%'			
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'WPA %'
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'TRIBUNE %'
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'NEWS %'
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'SEATTLE TIMES%'
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'SPOKESMAN%'
					) AND Source!='Manufacturer'
					THEN 'Newspapers/Magazines'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%VALPAK%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%RSVP Postcard%' 
						THEN 'Shared Mail'
												  
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%NATIVE ADS%'  THEN 'Native'
		
		
		-- No Definite Pattern Available
		/*
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%MALL%' 
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'SAM%'  
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%HOME DEPOT%'
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'MHR%'
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%WALMART%'
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'WI-%'
					THEN 'Retail'
					*/
					
					
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%CANVAS%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE 'JB CANVASS%'  THEN 'Canvass'
		
					
		-- No Definite Pattern 
		--WHEN (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%REFERRAL%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%ORGANIC%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%KOHLER%') THEN 'Consumer Referral'
		
		-- No Definite Pattern
		--WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%LAVIN%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%DOLEAD%'   THEN 'Branded Partner'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YARD%' THEN 'Out of Home'
		
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS CAL_Source

FROM [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]
WHERE Division = 'PBC' AND MAPPINGIND='UNMAP'

)



UPDATE  [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]  SET 
        UNI_CHANNEL				= M2.TX_CHANNEL
       ,UNI_SOURCEGROUP			= M2.TX_SOURCEGROUP
       ,UNI_SourceCode			= M2.TX_SourceCode
       ,MAPPINGIND				= 'MAP'
       ,LASTUPDATEDTS			= GETDATE()

FROM T_PBC M1 
JOIN [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] MX ON M1.LeadSubSourceID = MX.LeadSubSourceID
JOIN (
			SELECT DISTINCT TX_SOURCEGROUP,TX_SourceCode,TX_CHANNEL
				FROM [ZML].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]
				WHERE TX_SourceCode!='0' AND TX_SourceCode!='NA'
				) M2
ON M1.CAL_Source = M2.TX_SourceCode
WHERE CAL_Source IS NOT NULL;


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ PHI---------

WITH T_PHI AS 
(


SELECT 
	Division,
	LeadSubSourceID,
	SourceGroup,
	Source,
    CASE 
		WHEN ( UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%RADIO%' 	OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'iHeart%' 
													OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%ESPN%'
													)	AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%NEWS%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%TOUR%' THEN 'Broadcast Radio'
		
		WHEN (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% TV %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'TV %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% TV' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%TELEVISION%' 
									)  THEN 'Broadcast TV'
									
									
		WHEN (	UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%DIRECT MAIL%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%MAILER%' OR  UPPER(SubSource) LIKE  '%MAY - BATH%')
									AND (UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%VELPAK%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%VEL PAK%' AND UPPER(SubSource)  NOT LIKE '%DIRECT MAIL - RENUITY%') THEN 'Direct Mail'
        
		
		WHEN 
			(UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%FACEBOOK%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%META%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PINTEREST%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%INSTAGRAM%'
						) AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%Renuity - Meta%'
						THEN 'Paid Social'
						
						
        WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YELP%' THEN 'Directories'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YOUTUBE%' THEN 'YouTube' 
		
        WHEN (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%GOOGLE%' 
						--OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YOUTUBE%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YAHOO%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PPC%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PERFORMANCE MAX%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PAID SEARCH%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%BING – RENUITY%'
						) 
						AND (UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%ORGANIC%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%LOCAL%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%TV%'  ) THEN 'Paid Search'
						
						
        WHEN (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%ORGANIC%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%SEO%' )  
						AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%CUSTOMER REFERRAL%' 
						AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%BCI Organic%'
						AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%TV%'
						THEN 'Organic/SEO'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%EMAIL%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%CONQUEST%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%ADAPTIVE%' THEN 'Email'
		
        WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%NEWSPAPER%' 
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%MAGAZINE%' 
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%JOURNAL%'			
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'WPA %'
					OR (Source ='Gannett' AND (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'SC %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'NC %') )
					OR (Source ='Magazine'  AND UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'Clipper %' )
					THEN 'Newspapers/Magazines'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%VALPAK%' OR  UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'MSPARK%' THEN 'Shared Mail'
												  
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%NATIVE ADS%'  THEN 'Native'
		
		WHEN  UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'SAM%'  
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%HOME DEPOT%'
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%BJ%'
					THEN 'Retail'
					
					
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%CANVAS%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE 'JB CANVASS%'  THEN 'Canvass'
		
					
		-- No Definite Pattern MAC
		--WHEN (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%REFERRAL%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%ORGANIC%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%KOHLER%') THEN 'Consumer Referral'
		
		-- No Definite Pattern MAC
		--WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%LAVIN%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%DOLEAD%'   THEN 'Branded Partner'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YARD%' THEN 'Out of Home'
		
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS CAL_Source

FROM [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]
WHERE Division = 'PHI' AND MAPPINGIND='UNMAP'

)



UPDATE  [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]  SET 
        UNI_CHANNEL				= M2.TX_CHANNEL
       ,UNI_SOURCEGROUP			= M2.TX_SOURCEGROUP
       ,UNI_SourceCode			= M2.TX_SourceCode
       ,MAPPINGIND				= 'MAP'
       ,LASTUPDATEDTS			= GETDATE()

FROM T_PHI M1 
JOIN [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] MX ON M1.LeadSubSourceID = MX.LeadSubSourceID
JOIN (
			SELECT DISTINCT TX_SOURCEGROUP,TX_SourceCode,TX_CHANNEL
				FROM [ZML].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]
				WHERE TX_SourceCode!='0' AND TX_SourceCode!='NA'
				) M2
ON M1.CAL_Source = M2.TX_SourceCode
WHERE CAL_Source IS NOT NULL;


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ RTW---------

WITH T_RTW AS 
(


SELECT 
	Division,
	LeadSubSourceID,
	SourceGroup,
	Source,
    CASE 
		WHEN ( UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%RADIO%' 	OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% FM' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% FM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'FM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%-FM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% FM-%'
													OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% AM' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% AM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'AM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%-AM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% AM-%'
													OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'iHeart%' 
													OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%ESPN%'
													)	AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%NEWS%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%TOUR%' THEN 'Broadcast Radio'
		
		WHEN (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'TV' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% TV' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% TV %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'TV %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%TELEVISION%' 
											  ) THEN 'Broadcast TV'
									
									
		
		WHEN (	UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%DIRECT MAIL%' OR (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%GANNETT%' AND   Source LIKE '%Direct Mail%' ) )
									THEN 'Direct Mail'
        
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%FACEBOOK%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%META%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PINTEREST%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%INSTAGRAM%'
						THEN 'Paid Social'
						
						
        WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YELP%' THEN 'Directories'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YOUTUBE%' THEN 'YouTube' 
		
        WHEN (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%GOOGLE%' 
						--OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YOUTUBE%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YAHOO%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PPC%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PERFORMANCE MAX%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PAID SEARCH%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%BING – RENUITY%'
						) 
						THEN 'Paid Search'
						
						
        WHEN (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%ORGANIC%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%SEO%' )  
						AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%CUSTOMER REFERRAL%' 
						AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%BCI Organic%'
						AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%TV%'
						THEN 'Organic/SEO'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%EMAIL%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%CONQUEST%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%ADAPTIVE%' THEN 'Email'
		
        WHEN ( (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%GANNETT%' AND SourceGroup LIKE '%Print%') 
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%NEWSPAPER%' 
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%MAGAZINE%' 
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%JOURNAL%'			
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'WPA %'
						)
					THEN 'Newspapers/Magazines'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%VALPAK%' THEN 'Shared Mail'
												  
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%NATIVE ADS%'  THEN 'Native'
		
		
		/*-- Not existing in RTW
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%MALL%' 
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'SAM%'  
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%HOME DEPOT%'
					THEN 'Retail'
					*/
					
					
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%CANVAS%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE 'JB CANVASS%'  THEN 'Canvass'
		
					
		-- No Definite Pattern MAC
		--WHEN (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%REFERRAL%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%ORGANIC%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%KOHLER%') THEN 'Consumer Referral'
		
		-- No Definite Pattern MAC
		--WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%LAVIN%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%DOLEAD%'   THEN 'Branded Partner'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YARD%' THEN 'Out of Home'
		
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS CAL_Source


FROM [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]
WHERE Division = 'RTW' AND MAPPINGIND='UNMAP'

)


UPDATE  [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]  SET 
        UNI_CHANNEL				= M2.TX_CHANNEL
       ,UNI_SOURCEGROUP			= M2.TX_SOURCEGROUP
       ,UNI_SourceCode			= M2.TX_SourceCode
       ,MAPPINGIND				= 'MAP'
       ,LASTUPDATEDTS			= GETDATE()

FROM T_RTW M1 
JOIN [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] MX ON M1.LeadSubSourceID = MX.LeadSubSourceID
JOIN (
			SELECT DISTINCT TX_SOURCEGROUP,TX_SourceCode,TX_CHANNEL
				FROM [ZML].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]
				WHERE TX_SourceCode!='0' AND TX_SourceCode!='NA'
				) M2
ON M1.CAL_Source = M2.TX_SourceCode
WHERE CAL_Source IS NOT NULL;




------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ SWR---------

WITH T_SWR AS 
(



SELECT 
	Division,
	LeadSubSourceID,
	SourceGroup,
	Source,
    CASE 
		WHEN ( UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%RADIO%' 	OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% FM' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% FM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'FM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%-FM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% FM-%'
													OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% AM' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% AM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'AM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%-AM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% AM-%'
													OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'iHeart%' 
													OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%ESPN%'
													)	AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%NEWS%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%TOUR%' THEN 'Broadcast Radio'
		
		WHEN (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'TV' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% TV' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% TV %' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'TV %' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%TELEVISION%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%RSA%'
											  
											  ) AND  UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%BCI TV%' THEN 'Broadcast TV'
									
									
		
		WHEN (	UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%DIRECT MAIL%' OR (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%GANNETT%' AND   Source LIKE '%Direct Mail%' ) )
									AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%Direct Mail - Renuity%'
									AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%Renuity%'
									THEN 'Direct Mail'
        
		
		WHEN 
			(UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%FACEBOOK%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%META%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PINTEREST%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%INSTAGRAM%'
						)
						THEN 'Paid Social'

			WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%Sams Club%'
					THEN 'Retail'
						
						
        WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YELP%' THEN 'Directories'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YOUTUBE%' THEN 'YouTube' 
		
        WHEN (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%GOOGLE%' 
						--OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YOUTUBE%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YAHOO%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PPC%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PERFORMANCE MAX%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PAID SEARCH%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PAID SEARCH%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'SEM%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%BING – RENUITY%'
						) 
						THEN 'Paid Search'
						
						
        WHEN (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%ORGANIC%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%SEO%' )  
						AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%CUSTOMER REFERRAL%' 
						AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%BCI Organic%'
						AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%TV%'
						THEN 'Organic/SEO'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%EMAIL%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%CONQUEST%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%ADAPTIVE%' THEN 'Email'
		
        WHEN ( (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%GANNETT%' AND SourceGroup LIKE '%Print%') 
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%NEWSPAPER%' 
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%MAGAZINE%' 
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%JOURNAL%'			
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'Dallas Morning %'
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'SA Express %'
						)
					THEN 'Newspapers/Magazines'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%VALPAK%' 
			OR (Source='Shared Mail' AND 
							(	UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'MSPARK%' 
								OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'RED PLUM%' 
								OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'REDPLUM%' 
								)
					)
			THEN 'Shared Mail'
												  
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%NATIVE ADS%'  THEN 'Native'
		
		
		/*-- Not existing in RTW
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%MALL%' 
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'SAM%'  
					OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%HOME DEPOT%'
					THEN 'Retail'
					*/
					
					
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%CANVAS%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE 'JB CANVASS%'  THEN 'Canvass'
		
					
		-- No Definite Pattern MAC
		--WHEN (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%REFERRAL%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%ORGANIC%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%KOHLER%') THEN 'Consumer Referral'
		
		-- No Definite Pattern MAC
		--WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%LAVIN%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%DOLEAD%'   THEN 'Branded Partner'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YARD%' THEN 'Out of Home'

		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%Three Ship%' THEN 'Exclusive'
		
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS CAL_Source

FROM [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]
WHERE Division = 'SWR' AND MAPPINGIND='UNMAP'

)



UPDATE  [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]  SET 
        UNI_CHANNEL				= M2.TX_CHANNEL
       ,UNI_SOURCEGROUP			= M2.TX_SOURCEGROUP
       ,UNI_SourceCode			= M2.TX_SourceCode
       ,MAPPINGIND				= 'MAP'
       ,LASTUPDATEDTS			= GETDATE()

FROM T_SWR M1 
JOIN [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] MX ON M1.LeadSubSourceID = MX.LeadSubSourceID
JOIN (
			SELECT DISTINCT TX_SOURCEGROUP,TX_SourceCode,TX_CHANNEL
				FROM [ZML].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]
				WHERE TX_SourceCode!='0' AND TX_SourceCode!='NA'
				) M2
ON M1.CAL_Source = M2.TX_SourceCode
WHERE CAL_Source IS NOT NULL;











------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ CTA---------

WITH T_CTA AS 
(



SELECT 
	Division,
	LeadSubSourceID,
	SourceGroup,
	Source,
    CASE 
		WHEN ( UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%RADIO%' 	OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% FM' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% FM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'FM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%-FM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% FM-%'
												OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% AM' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% AM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'AM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%-AM %' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '% AM-%'
													OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'iHeart%' 
													OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%ESPN%'
													OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%WMAL%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%Radio%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%WBAL%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%WTOP%'
													OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%WIHT%'
													)	AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%NEWS%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%TOUR%'  THEN 'Broadcast Radio'
		-- BroadCast is not a part of CTA as of now
		--WHEN (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%TV%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%TELEVISION%' 
		--											OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'PROMEDIA%'
		--											OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%RSR%'	
		--											OR (UPPER(Source) LIKE '%RON SHERMAN%')
													
		--											) AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%BCI-WIT%' THEN 'Broadcast TV'
		
		WHEN (	UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%DIRECT MAIL%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%MAILER%')
									AND (UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%VELPAK%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%VEL PAK%' AND UPPER(SubSource)  NOT LIKE '%DIRECT MAIL - RENUITY%') THEN 'Direct Mail'
        
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%FACEBOOK%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%META%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PINTEREST%' THEN 'Paid Social'
						
						
        WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YELP%' THEN 'Directories'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YOUTUBE%' THEN 'YouTube' 
		
        WHEN (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%GOOGLE%' 
						--OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YOUTUBE%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YAHOO%' 
						OR (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PPC%' AND Source NOT LIKE '%Internet%')-- Causing overwrite with Organic/SEO
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PERFORMANCE MAX%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%PAID SEARCH%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%BING – RENUITY%'
						-- new '%%' 
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%BING%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%AdWords%'
						--OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%GDN PPC%'
						OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%Renuity - Display%'
						) 
						AND (UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%ORGANIC%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%LOCAL%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%TV%'  ) THEN 'Paid Search'
						
						
        WHEN (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%ORGANIC%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%SEO%' ) AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%CUSTOMER REFERRAL%' THEN 'Organic/SEO'
		
		--WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%EMAIL%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%CONQUEST%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%ADAPTIVE%' THEN 'Email'
		
        WHEN ( (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%GANNETT%' AND SourceGroup LIKE '%Print%') OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%NEWSPAPER%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%MAGAZINE%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%JOURNAL%' ) THEN 'Newspapers/Magazines'
		
		--WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%VALPAK%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%VAL PAK%' 
		--										  OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%REDPLUM%' 
		--										  OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%RSVP%'
		--										  OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%REDPLUM%'
		--										  THEN 'Shared Mail'
												  
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%NATIVE ADS%'  THEN 'Native'
		
		--WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%MALL%' 
		--			OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE 'SAM%'  
		--			OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%HOME DEPOT%'
		--			OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%BRANDSMART%'
		--			OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%IME- BJs%'
		--			THEN 'Retail'
					
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%CANVAS%' AND (UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%JB CANVAS%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%DP CANVASS%')  THEN 'Canvass'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%WALK-IN%'  OR (UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%CUSTOMER REFERRAL%' AND UPPER(SubSource) NOT LIKE '%ORGANIC%') THEN 'Consumer Referral'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%LAVIN MEDIA%' OR UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%SOCIAL BLUE%'   THEN 'Branded Partner'
		
		WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%YARD%' THEN 'Out of Home'

		--WHEN UPPER(SubSource) LIKE '%DP Canvass%' THEN 'Agents Referral'
		
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS CAL_Source 

FROM [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]
WHERE Division = 'CTA' AND MAPPINGIND='UNMAP'

)



UPDATE  [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]  SET 
        UNI_CHANNEL				= M2.TX_CHANNEL
       ,UNI_SOURCEGROUP			= M2.TX_SOURCEGROUP
       ,UNI_SourceCode			= M2.TX_SourceCode
       ,MAPPINGIND				= 'MAP'
       ,LASTUPDATEDTS			= GETDATE()

FROM T_CTA M1 
JOIN [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] MX ON M1.LeadSubSourceID = MX.LeadSubSourceID
JOIN (
			SELECT DISTINCT TX_SOURCEGROUP,TX_SourceCode,TX_CHANNEL
				FROM [ZML].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]
				WHERE TX_SourceCode!='0' AND TX_SourceCode!='NA'
				) M2
ON M1.CAL_Source = M2.TX_SourceCode
WHERE CAL_Source IS NOT NULL;

UPDATE [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]
SET MappingInd='UNMAP' 
WHERE UNI_SOURCECODE IS NULL OR UNI_SOURCECODE=''

UPDATE A
SET A.UNI_Channel = B.TX_Channel ,
A.UNI_SourceGroup = B.TX_SourceGroup ,
A.UNI_SourceCode =  B.TX_SourceCode,
A.MappingInd ='MAP'
FROM [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] A 
JOIN  [ZML].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] B 
ON A.SubSource = B.LeadSubSource
WHERE A.MappingInd = 'UNMAP'

UPDATE [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]
SET UNI_Channel='NA',UNI_SourceGroup='NA',UNI_SourceCode='NA',
MappingInd='MAP'
WHERE SubSource IS NULL;


UPDATE [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]
SET UNI_Channel='NA',UNI_SourceGroup='NA',UNI_SourceCode='NA',
MappingInd='MAP'
WHERE Source='1056589';

WITH M1 AS 
(
SELECT DISTINCT
	Division,
	LeadSubSourceID,
	SourceGroup,
	Source,
	CASE 
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Newspaper%'    THEN 'Newspapers/Magazines'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%TV%' OR Source LIKE '%Television%'       THEN 'Broadcast TV'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Radio%'    THEN 'Broadcast Radio'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Direct Mail%'   THEN 'Direct Mail'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Shared Mail%'        THEN 'Shared Mail'
		WHEN Source LIKE '%Paid Search%'        THEN 'Paid Search'
		ELSE NULL END AS CAL_SOURCE
	FROM [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] Where MappingInd='UNMAP' and 
	Source<>'0' and Source is not null
	
	)


UPDATE  [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]  SET 
        UNI_CHANNEL				= M2.TX_CHANNEL
       ,UNI_SOURCEGROUP			= M2.TX_SOURCEGROUP
       ,UNI_SOURCECODE				= M2.TX_SOURCECODE
       ,MAPPINGIND				= 'MAP'
       ,LASTUPDATEDTS			= GETDATE()

FROM M1 
JOIN [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] MX ON M1.LeadSubSourceID = MX.LeadSubSourceID
JOIN (
			SELECT DISTINCT TX_SOURCEGROUP,TX_SOURCECODE,TX_CHANNEL
				FROM [ZML].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]
				WHERE TX_SOURCECODE!='0' AND TX_SOURCECODE!='NA'
				) M2
ON M1.CAL_SOURCE = M2.TX_SOURCECODE
WHERE CAL_SOURCE IS NOT NULL;
